tasks.description: Decline meetings outside work hours (before 11:30 AM or after 10 PM ET)
tasks.prompt: Use the Calendar MCP to check for any NEW meeting invites (pending/tentative) on my calendar for the next 7 days. For each meeting invite: 1. If the meeting starts BEFORE 11:30 AM ET or AFTER 10:00 PM ET: - Check who sent it. Do NOT decline if the organizer is an org leader, my direct manager, a team member I work with closely, or someone I frequently interact with. Use your judgment based on titles (Director, VP, GM, CVP, Partner, etc.) and context from WorkIQ if needed. - If it's safe to decline: decline the invite WITHOUT sending a response (silently decline, do not notify the organizer). - Log what you declined to the Home channel: '🤖 Copilot: Auto-declined: [meeting title] at [time] from [organizer] (outside work hours)' 2. If the meeting is within work hours (11:30 AM - 10:00 PM ET), leave it alone. Be conservative: when in doubt about whether someone is important, do NOT decline.

tasks.description: Check email and summarize important items to Home channel
tasks.prompt: Use the Mail MCP to check for unread emails from the last 20 minutes. If there are any that seem important or actionable, post a brief summary to the Home channel as an Adaptive Card.
